\tzpentry{ID5925}{Magnetic Flux Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5925 introduces Magnetic Flux Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \hat{\Phi} = \sum_{m,n} \left( a_{m,n} e^{i(m\theta_1+n\theta_2)} + a_{m,n}^\dagger e^{-i(m\theta_1+n\theta_2)} \right) \end{equation}
